eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ouray, CO; at 10:07 PM on JUN 27, 2026 Effective until 4:07 AM JUN 28, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. There is a PRE-EVACUATION notice for the due to a wildfire in the area. Collect important documents and medications and be ready to leave at a moments notice. This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. There is a PRE-EVACUATION notice for CR17 from Whispering Pines to Black Lake due to a wildfire in the area. Collect important documents, medications, and other items you may need and be ready to leave at a moments notice.
